message:
refactor(abi): migrate renameat2, getpt, posix_openpt to native syscalls

Replace libc::syscall with frankenlibc_core::syscall wrappers:
- renameat2: sys_renameat2
- getpt: sys_openat
- posix_openpt: sys_openat

Reduces libc::syscall calls from 101 to 97.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
